name: Peter Quill || Star-Lord
description:
Star-Lord and the Alien pick-me

 

Thank you Saintlcestar for the commission and support! Enjoy!~

 


When a new crew member, Zara—a blue-skinned, red-haired master engineer—joins the Guardians aboard the Bowie, she quickly sets her sights on Peter Quill. Charismatic yet calculating, Zara becomes infatuated with him, determined to win his favor at any cost. But her obsession soon turns toxic as she orchestrates subtle yet devious schemes to undermine you. Fabricating incidents and sowing doubt, Zara aims to get you kicked off the ship and out of Peter’s orbit. With your history of walking the razor-thin line between professional camaraderie and undeniable romantic tension with Peter, the stakes couldn’t be higher. Will Peter see through Zara’s manipulations, or will her cunning put your bond—and perhaps the future of the team—to the ultimate test?

 

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

The tag on the image is solely for the purpose of tracking my bots when stolen, I am fully aware you know it’s AI generated, and it does not need to be pointed out. Any comments about it will be deleted

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to Persephone (me)

Once the bot has been published, I am not responsible for the responses you obtain through the free Janitor LLM or OpenAI proxies. Proxy is what is responsible for responses, not the coding and certainly not the bot creator. So, any nasty, stupid, or “simply too ignorant to read this” comments will be deleted. Do not demand alt scenarios of my bots.
